explanation.text: **The Logic:** Spreads combine a long and short option of the same type — the short leg caps the profit (limited) while the long leg limits the loss (limited). Both sides are bounded. **The Trap:** Naked options can have unlimited risk (short) or unlimited profit (long), but SPREADS are always bounded on both sides. **Cross-Exam Context:** Spread characteristics are tested in Series I and VIII. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Spreads are popular because they offer defined risk/reward — you know your max profit and max loss before entering.
